mapper.select: SELECT contract_id, user_id, country_id, original_file_url, ocr_text, DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS createdAt FROM contracts WHERE contract_id = #{contractId}
SELECT law_id, country_id, title, article_number, content, law_vector FROM laws WHERE country_id = #{countryId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO contract_clauses ( contract_id, clause_text, risk_score, risk_type, ai_comment ) VALUES ( #{contractId}, #{clauseText}, #{riskScore}, #{riskType}, #{aiComment} )

INSERT INTO contract_analysis_summary ( contract_id, risk_chart_data, total_risk_level, translated_text, created_at ) VALUES ( #{contractId}, #{riskChartData}, #{totalRiskLevel}, #{translatedText}, NOW() )
